# other

**Type Property**

A tag indicating that the token is a non-linguistic item, such as a symbol.

## Declaration

```swift
static let other: NLTag
```

## Token types

- **word**: A tag indicating that the token is a word.
- **punctuation**: A tag indicating that the token is punctuation.
- **whitespace**: A tag indicating that the token is white space of any sort.

items.description: A tag indicating that the token is a word.
items.name: word

items.description: A tag indicating that the token is punctuation.
items.name: punctuation

items.description: A tag indicating that the token is white space of any sort.
